instruction: Fix the color of the thin black frame circle on this folder minus icon — it's the wrong shade (orange).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/folder-minus.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 13.5H9m4.06-7.19-2.12-2.12a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.061-.44H4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 6v12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21.75 18V9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-5.379a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.06-.44Z"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="#f97316" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="64" cy="64" r="60" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/folder-minus.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 13.5H9m4.06-7.19-2.12-2.12a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.061-.44H4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 6v12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21.75 18V9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-5.379a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.06-.44Z"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="64" cy="64" r="60" />
</svg>
